build.buildCommand: cd backend && npm install --omit=dev && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://placeholder:placeholder@localhost:5432/placeholder npx prisma generate

deploy.startCommand: cd backend && export DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-${URL_DO_BANCO_DE_DADOS}}" && export FRONTEND_URL="${FRONTEND_URL:-${URL_FRONTEND}}" && export PORT="${PORT:-${PORTA}}" && export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY="${ANTHROPIC_API_KEY:-${ANTROPIC_API_KEY}}" && node node_modules/.bin/prisma db push --accept-data-loss --skip-generate && node src/server.js
